name: design: Company logo vuông + cùng size LinkedIn

tasks.name: Remove rounded-full and border from company logo img class
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && [ "$(grep -E 'company_logo\.jpg.*rounded-full' index.html | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "0" ] && [ "$(grep -E 'company_logo\.jpg.*border' index.html | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "0" ] && grep -q 'src="assets/images/company_logo.jpg" alt="Unknown Studio" class="w-4 h-4 object-cover"' index.html
